goal: Polish the community post list sorting control so users can switch between sorting modes through a more intentional gold-red UI that matches the existing community theme.
constraints: Limit UI changes to the sorting area in CommunityPostList and directly related task records.
Do not change community data flow, sorting semantics, feed contents, or post cards.
Keep all existing sort modes available: latest, hot, featured, and most_favorited.
Preserve the current list scrolling behavior while interacting with the sorting area.
deliverables: Sorting control in CommunityPostList is visually aligned with the community theme.
Users can clearly switch between all sort modes without the current small native-select look.
Community list interaction and scrolling continue to work after the UI change.
